chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. B-79 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on CMA No. 13931/2024 (Urgent) 2. For orders on CMA No. 13932/2024 (Order 1 Rule 10 CPC) 3. For orders on CMA No. 13933/2024 (Order 23 Rule 3 CPC) 02.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Mehmood Ali Advocate for the Plaintiff along with Arbaz Yar Khan Advocate Mr. Atif Chaudhry Advocate for Defendant Nos. 1 to 3 Mr. Abdul Qayyum Abbasi Advocate for the Defendant No. 1 and 2 Imran Hameed authorized person for Defendant No.1 Jiswant Kumar authorized person of Defendant No.2 Noor Mustafa Brohi, Chief Manager and Syed Mustafa Rizvi VP Credit Admin Division, Sindh Bank Limited.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency allowed. 2. CMA No. 13932/2024: This is an application under order I Rule 10 CPC for striking out name of the Defendant Nos. 3 to 6 and adding proposed defendant No. 1. By consent of all counsels application is allowed. 3. CMA No. 13933/2024: This is a joint application filed for consent/compromise decree under Order XXIII Rule 3 read with Section 151 CPC. Parties have reached the compromise, detail whereof has been provided in the restructuring agreement, which is annexed with the application. Parties and their respective counsel present in Court admit the contents of compromise application and restructuring agreement as well as their signature thereon and record their no objection if the suit is decreed. Suit stands decreed in terms of restructuring agreement under Order XXIII Rule 3 CPC. Office to prepare compromise decree accordingly. JUDGE Amjad PS
